name: qwen-studio
description: Open-source Qwen AI (Tongyi Qianwen) desktop client for Linux. Full MCP support, system tray, bundled runtimes. Alternative to official Windows/Mac-only Qwen Studio app.
author: youssefvdel <youssefvdel@gmail.com>

scripts.start: npm run copy-assets && tsc && electron-forge start
scripts.package: npm run copy-assets && tsc && electron-forge package
scripts.make: npm run copy-assets && tsc && electron-forge make
scripts.make:deb: npm run copy-assets && tsc && electron-forge make --targets=@electron-forge/maker-deb
scripts.make:rpm: npm run copy-assets && tsc && electron-forge make --targets=@electron-forge/maker-rpm
scripts.make:all: npm run copy-assets && tsc && electron-forge make
scripts.copy-assets: cp -r src/renderer/* out/renderer/ 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p out/renderer && cp -r src/renderer/* out/renderer/
